description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel with a robust receiver and a distinctive wooden stock and grip, suggesting a classic military design. The body is primarily composed of dark metal, with visible mechanical components such as the trigger, magazine, and charging handle. The stock is skeletonized with a metal buttplate and a wooden cheek rest, providing both stability and reduced weight. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel and receiver, with no optical attachments visible. The muzzle is fitted with a device that resembles a flash hider, and the overall construction is utilitarian, built for durability and function in urban environments.
description: A long, dark metal rifle with a wooden skeletonized stock, detachable box magazine, iron sights, and a flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, grip, and the entire barrel with attached muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, narrow barrel profile, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the receiver, magazine, and the wooden elements of the stock and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, cheek rest, and the rear iron sight alignment.
